mission.title: surrealdb: Feature: Add lightweight database backend for embedded use
mission.description: Feature: Add lightweight database backend for embedded use. Requested by 10+ users.

steps.title: Check current surrealdb setup
steps.description:
Verify your surrealdb version and configuration:
```bash
surreal version
```
This feature requires a working surrealdb installation.

steps.title: Review surrealdb configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant surrealdb configuration:
### Is your feature request related to a problem?

I am using surrealdb as an embedded database for my application and currently the only backing database option is RocksDB. I'm running into the following problems:

- RocksDB is large.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Feature: Add lightweight database backend for embedded use
steps.description:
Thank you for submitting this pull request! We appreciate you spending the time to work on these changes.

## What is the motivation?

Sled is a key value database 100% written in Rust.   

## What does this change do?

This PR provides a Datastore/Transaction implementation based on Sled.

## What
```yaml
cd lib
cargo test --features kv-sled test_transaction_

...
running 10 tests
test kvs::sled::tests::test_transaction_sled_scan_in_transaction ... ok
test kvs::sled::tests::test_transaction_sled_scan_mixed ... ok
test kvs::sled::tests::test_transaction_sled_scan_mixed_with_deletion ... ok
test kvs::sled::tests::test_transaction_sled_put_exi_get ... ok
test kvs::sled::tests::test_transaction_sled_scan_in_storage ... ok
test kvs::sled::tests::test_transaction_sled_putc_err ... ok
test kvs::sled::tests::test_transaction_sled_cancel_put_and_del ... ok
test kvs::sled::tests::test_transaction_sled_pu
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "Feature: Add lightweight database backend for embedded use" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
Thank you for submitting this pull request! We appreciate you spending the time to work on these changes.

## What is the motivation?

Sled is a key value database 100% written in Rust.   

## What does this change do?

This PR provides a Datastore/Transaction implementation based on Sled.
codeSnippets:
cd lib
cargo test --features kv-sled test_transaction_

...
running 10 tests
test kvs::sled::tests::test_transaction_sled_scan_in_transaction ... ok
test kvs::sled::tests::test_transaction_sled_scan_mixed ... ok
test kvs::sled::tests::test_transaction_sled_scan_mixed_with_deletion ... ok
test kvs::sled::tests::test_transaction_sled_put_exi_get ... ok
test kvs::sled::tests::test_transaction_sled_scan_in_storage ... ok
test kvs::sled::tests::test_transaction_sled_putc_err ... ok
test kvs::sled::tests::test_transaction_sled_cancel_put_and_del ... ok
test kvs::sled::tests::test_transaction_sled_putc_ok ... ok
test kvs::sled::tests::test_transaction_sled_del_in_transaction ... ok
test kvs::sled::tests::test_transaction_sled_del_in_storage ... ok
cargo run --features storage-sled -- start -u root -p pass --log debug sled:/tmp/surreal.db

prerequisites.description: A working surrealdb installation or development environment.
